raw_text:
KAVYA SRI VIJAYALAKSHMI VANKAYALA
kavyasri.v01@gmail.com | +91 9014240597 | Chilakaluripet, Andhra Pradesh | LinkedIn | GitHub
CAREER OBJECTIVE
Driven computer science student aiming to leverage Java, data structures, and modern web technologies to develop
efficient, scalable, and production-ready software solutions.
EDUCATION
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), Computer Science and Engineering, 2023–2027 — CGPA: 8.84
University College of Engineering, Kakinada (JNTUK)
Intermediate (MPC), BIEAP, Sri Chaitanya Junior College 2021–2023 — 980/1000
Class X, BSEAP, Modern High School 2020–2021 — 597/600
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Programming Languages: Java, Python, C frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js
Backend: Node.js, Spring Boot Testing: Selenium, REST-Assured
Databases: MySQL, MongoDB Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Postman
PROJECTS
E-Commerce Website
• Developed a responsive e-commerce web application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with interactive UI
• Implemented search, filtering, and a localStorage-based cart for efficient product discovery & user experience
API Key Leak Detection System – Full Stack
• Developed a full-stack web app to detect exposed API keys across 4 data sources using regex-based scanning
• Built a regex engine for 10+ credential formats (AWS, GitHub, OpenAI, etc.) to improve detection coverage
• Designed risk classification with alerts using Flask & MongoDB, handling 50+ scans with tracking & remediation
INTERNSHIP
Java Backend & Automation Intern, Infosys Springboard Sep 2025 – Nov 2025
• Engineered a scalable regression framework for UI & API using Java, Selenium, REST-Assured, Spring Boot
• Optimized parallel test execution (multi-threading) to run 50+ test cases concurrently, improving efficiency
• Automated API testing and HTML/CSV reporting with MySQL and RabbitMQ for test tracking and reliability
CERTIFICATIONS
• Completed a 12-week NPTEL SWAYAM certification in Cloud Computing
• Earned Java certification from Infosys Springboard
ACHIEVEMENTS
• Achieved 1st Place (Rs. 50,000) at ISEA–JNTU 2026 CTF Hackathon for building an Full Stack API
key leak detection application
• Awarded INR 1.15 lakh/year in merit scholarships (Reliance Foundation, North South Foundation, NRIVA)
• Secured Rank 1564 in AP EAPCET (state-level engineering entrance exam) among 2,00,000+ candidates
• Solved 450+ DSA problems on platforms like LeetCode, CodeChef, GeeksforGeeks, and HackerRank
EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES
• Won 1st Prize in JNTUK Central Zone Inter-Collegiate Kho-Kho Tournament (Women).

--- Extracted Hyperlinks ---

https://www.codechef.com/users/sri_187
https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/user/vksvlk3ih
https://www.hackerrank.com/profile/vksvl2006

ai_analysis.summary: A driven Computer Science undergraduate with a strong academic record and practical experience in backend development and test automation. Proficient in Java, Python, and web technologies, with a passion for building efficient and scalable software solutions. Seeking to leverage technical skills in a challenging role.
strengths: Solid academic foundation with a high CGPA and numerous scholarships.
Hands-on experience in full-stack development and test automation from internships and projects.
Proven problem-solving skills demonstrated by DSA achievements and hackathon wins.
Proficiency in a wide range of modern programming languages, frameworks, and tools.
weaknesses: Limited professional work experience beyond internships.
Project descriptions could benefit from quantifiable outcomes and impact metrics.
No explicit mention of experience with production deployment or CI/CD pipelines.

projects.title: E-Commerce Website
projects.description: Developed a responsive e-commerce web application with interactive UI, implementing essential features like search and filtering. Enhanced user experience through the integration of a localStorage-based shopping cart for efficient product discovery.

projects.title: API Key Leak Detection System
projects.description: Created a full-stack web application to detect exposed API keys across multiple data sources using a custom regex engine capable of handling over 10 credential formats. Designed a risk classification system with alerts and implemented tracking with Flask and MongoDB.
